Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reopen Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Christopher K. Zand, Esq. and Ariel Gershaw, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Carol Szego
Teresa McLoughlin Rice, Esq. and Kenneth M. Greenstein, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Ralph Dayan

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Carol Szego's Motion to Reopen Discovery denied in part, granted in part. Motion to reopen discovery for all purposes denied. Discovery may proceed for the limited purpose of completing any outstanding and unresolved requests or notices originally propounded by plaintiff on December 14, 2006. All discovery shall be completed no later than September 17, 2007. Counsel for defendant to prepare order. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
